intro ⟨a, ha⟩
      have h₁ : ∀ i, a i ∈ A i := ha
      -- We need to show that the square of the product set is covered by the product of the F_i scaled by A.

        have h₂ : ∀ i, (a i * a i) ∈ (F i : Set (G i)) • A i := by

        -- Now we need to construct an element in the product of F_i and A_i that maps to (a_i * a_i).

        have h₃ : ∃ (b : ι → G) (c : ι → G), (∀ i, b i ∈ (F i : Set (G i))) ∧ (∀ i, c i ∈ A i) ∧ (∀ i, a i * a i = b i * c i) := by

          choose b hb using h₂
          have h₄ : ∀ i, ∃ (c : G), c ∈ A i ∧ a i * a i = b i i * c := by
            intro i
            have h₅ : (a i * a i) ∈ (F i : Set (G i)) • A i := h₂ i
            simp only [Set.mem_smul, exists_prop] at h₅
            obtain ⟨f, hf, c, hc, h₆⟩ := h₅
            have h₇ : b i i = f := by

              <;> aesop

            simp_all [h₇]

            simp only [Set.mem_coe] at h₅ ⊢
